name: lawlint
description: A linter for AI-generated legal and general text.

scripts.rules:generate: mkdir -p apps/website/src/generated && cargo run -q -p lawlint-cli -- rules --json > apps/website/src/generated/rules.json
scripts.typecheck: bun run wasm:build && bun run rules:generate && bunx tsc --noEmit -p apps/website/tsconfig.json
